gateTitle: No Run-Bound Paths In Durable Authority
purpose: Block durable contract authority when concrete run-envelope paths leak into reusable contract, SOG, schema, gate, policy, or projection surfaces.
passConditions: contract authority under contracts/ is reusable and parameterized
run-specific values are supplied by context, invocation input, or run manifest
receipts under conveyor/runs/ record concrete paths and hashes
durable SOGs contain no hardcoded dated run-envelope paths
proof-only or migration exceptions are explicitly classified and blocked from durable product authority
blockConditions: hardcoded dated conveyor run path in contracts
hardcoded slice run key in reusable SOG authority
hardcoded evidence receipt path where manifest/context input is required
contract artifact claims reusable authority while embedding concrete run instance values
concrete evidence leaks into durable authority
completionPosture: If it lives under contracts/, it must be reusable authority. If concrete evidence leaks into contracts/, the conveyor blocks.
